game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Rusty Lake: Roots KR:** Rusty Lake: Roots is a premium point-and-click adventure game where players unravel the Vanderboom family's history across 33+ distinct levels, each representing a pivotal moment in their lineage. Players interact with the environment by tapping on objects, characters, and directional arrows to explore scenes, collect inventory items, and trigger dialogue or events. Core gameplay involves solving interconnected puzzles within each level, often requiring players to drag-and-drop inventory items onto specific environmental elements, combine items, or decipher clues to manipulate objects and progress. Successfully completing a level unlocks the next chronological segment of the family tree, represented by a new character portrait, and advances the overarching narrative, with no traditional "loss" conditions as puzzles can be retried indefinitely. Progression is entirely linear through the 33+ levels, with additional achievements earned by discovering hidden secrets or completing specific optional tasks, further expanding the game's lore.
game_info.description: Unravel the mysterious Vanderboom family history across generations. Explore intricate scenes, collect items, and solve interconnected puzzles to progress through the family tree. Each level represents a pivotal moment in the lineage. Interact with objects and use your inventory wisely to unlock secrets and advance the narrative. Complete all levels to reveal the full story.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate between interactive objects/hotspots in the scene
Space: Interact with selected object or use selected inventory item
Z: Cycle through collected inventory items
Shift: Examine selected inventory item more closely
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (return to start screen)
ENTER: Start game from title screen

TEST_1.test_description: Test basic navigation and interaction mechanics. Verify that the player can move between hotspots, select objects, and trigger basic interactions without errors.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Navigate through all available hotspots in the first level using arrow keys. Interact with each object using Space. Attempt to pick up any available items and cycle through inventory.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully navigates all hotspots, interactions trigger appropriate responses, and inventory system functions correctly. No crashes or visual glitches occur during basic gameplay.

TEST_1.expected: Player successfully navigates all hotspots, interactions trigger appropriate responses, and inventory system functions correctly. No crashes or visual glitches occur during basic gameplay.

TEST_2.test_description: Test the win condition by completing all puzzle levels. Validate that puzzles can be solved in the correct sequence and that level progression works as intended.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Implement an optimal puzzle-solving strategy that knows the solution to each level. Interact with objects in the correct order, use inventory items appropriately, and progress through all levels to reach the win condition.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: All levels are completed successfully, the family tree fully unlocks, and the game reaches GAME_OVER_WIN state. The final score reflects completion of all levels and any discovered secrets.

TEST_3.test_description: Test edge cases like attempting to use wrong items on objects, navigating with empty inventory, and handling puzzle failures gracefully.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Deliberately attempt incorrect solutions, use wrong inventory items on objects, and verify the game provides appropriate feedback without breaking. Test boundary conditions of the interaction system.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Game handles all edge cases gracefully with appropriate feedback messages. No crashes occur from invalid interactions. Player can continue playing after mistakes.
